name: git-review
description: Git change review, commit hygiene, and PR preparation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Branch, diff, review, and ship-ready commits.
interface.longDescription: Turns repository changes into reviewable and releasable outputs: branch hygiene, commit quality, PR readiness, and security checks.
defaultPrompt: Review current diff and prepare a clean commit plan.
Generate a PR-ready summary with risk and test notes.
Run a security-focused review before release tagging.
